name: commentary
description: Commentary monorepo — out-of-file documentation anchored to code

scripts.build: npm run build -w @commentary/core && npm run build -w @commentary/render && npm run build -w code-commentary-static && npm run build -w @commentary/cli && npm run build -w commentary-vscode
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run dupes
scripts.test:unit: npm run build -w @commentary/render && vitest run -c vitest.config.ts
scripts.code-commentary-static:build: npm run build -w @commentary/render && npm run build -w code-commentary-static && npm run site -w code-commentary-static
